# Milind Prabhakar

> Lead Software Engineer based in Chicago, IL. 8 years building enterprise-grade systems in fintech and applied AI.
> Currently at Capital One. Previously Discover Financial Services and Oracle Financial Services.
> Specializes in distributed systems, payment platforms, Kafka event-driven architecture, and AI-integrated developer tooling.

## Key Achievements
- Leading migration of 10M secured-card customers from Discover to Capital One post-acquisition
- Built Kafka ACH refund pipeline with Spring Boot, idempotent consumers, and DLQ replay, generating $65M in annual savings at Discover
- Cross-team technical anchor on a $500M registration and activation modernization program, delivering 73% registration lift and 64% activation lift
- Achieved 99.994% uptime on modernized secured-card platforms with blue-green deployments and Catchpoint synthetic monitoring
- Building AI agents into Capital One's universal CI/CD pipeline for automated PR review and vulnerability remediation, with governance controls for regulated banking
- At Oracle, built core banking processing engines handling 1,000 TPS for 120M customers and led the Canara-Syndicate merger migration covering 95M records with zero data loss

## Tech Expertise
Java, Spring Boot, Apache Kafka, AWS, Kubernetes, OpenShift, Helm, Terraform,
Claude API, OpenAI API, LLM Agents, RAG, pgvector, LangChain, Twilio,
React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Oracle DB
